hero.description: Professional junk removal and hauling services for homeowners, renters, landlords, contractors, and businesses. Clearing clutter, one load at a time.

about.description: We're a locally owned and operated junk removal company based in Brookings, South Dakota. We help homeowners, renters, landlords, contractors, and businesses remove unwanted items quickly and affordably — so you can reclaim your space without the stress.

description: Dakota Junk Removals was founded with a simple mission: make junk removal fast, affordable, and completely stress-free. We saw too many homeowners, landlords, and businesses throughout Brookings, Sioux Falls, and Watertown struggling with clutter they couldn't get rid of on their own. Garages packed to the ceiling with years of accumulated stuff. Rental properties full of abandoned furniture after tenants moved out. Yards buried in branches, leaves, and old landscaping debris. Construction sites littered with scrap materials and renovation waste. People wanted their space back — but they didn't have the time, the truck, or the manpower to make it happen.

That's exactly where we come in. We show up on time with the right equipment, give you a fair upfront price with zero hidden fees, and handle every bit of the heavy lifting ourselves. No complicated contracts. No surprises on the bill. No expecting you to drag everything to the curb before we arrive. Just point at what you want gone, and we'll make it disappear — quickly, safely, and affordably.

What started as a single truck and a commitment to honest work has grown into a trusted local junk removal company serving the entire region. We've helped hundreds of homeowners reclaim their garages and basements. We've partnered with landlords and property managers to turn over rentals fast. We've worked alongside contractors to keep job sites clean and safe. And we've done it all with the same straightforward approach: fair prices, friendly service, and a genuine commitment to our community.

Today, Dakota Junk Removals proudly serves Brookings, Sioux Falls, Watertown, and all surrounding communities. Whether you need a single appliance hauled away or a complete estate cleanout, we're the local team you can count on. Because at the end of the day, our job is simple: junk gone, stress gone — so you can enjoy your space again.

image.alt: Dakota Junk Removals Owner and team

description: Dakota Junk Removals offers fast, affordable hauling services for residential and commercial customers.
No job is too small. No mess is too big. Just tell us what you need gone and we'll take care of the rest.

section.headline: What Our Customers Say
section.description: Hear from homeowners, landlords, and contractors who chose Dakota Junk Removals.
section.featured: Trusted Junk Removal in Brookings, Sioux Falls & Watertown

testimonials.name: Sarah T.
testimonials.text: Called Dakota Junk Removals for a garage full of stuff. Free estimate, showed up on time, had it all gone in a few hours. Can't recommend them enough.

testimonials.name: Mike R.
testimonials.text: I use Dakota Junk Removals for all my rental cleanouts. Fast, affordable, and reliable every single time. They make my job so much easier.

testimonials.name: Jason K.
testimonials.text: They hauled away a full truckload of renovation debris. Showed up when they said they would, fair price, no issues. Will use again.

testimonials.name: Linda P.
testimonials.text: Had an old shed and broken refrigerator sitting around for years. One call to Dakota Junk Removals and it was all gone the same week.

testimonials.name: Dakota Junk Removals Team
testimonials.text: Junk removal should be fast, affordable, and completely stress-free. That's exactly what we deliver to every customer, every time. No hidden fees, no excuses — just junk gone and stress gone.

section.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
section.description: Honest answers about our junk removal, cleanout, and hauling services.

items.question: What items do you haul away?
items.answer: We haul furniture, appliances, yard debris, construction waste, and general household or commercial clutter.

items.question: Do you offer free estimates?
items.answer: Yes. Every estimate is free with absolutely no obligation. No hidden fees — ever.

items.question: How fast can you come out?
items.answer: We typically schedule within a few days. Same-day and next-day service is often available — just ask.

items.question: Do you do property cleanouts?
items.answer: Yes. We handle rental cleanouts, estate cleanouts, foreclosure cleanouts, and garage cleanouts.

items.question: Do you take construction debris?
items.answer: Yes. Renovation debris, scrap lumber, drywall, and general contractor cleanup are all part of our services.

items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: Brookings, Sioux Falls, Watertown, and all surrounding communities.

items.question: Do I need to move anything before you arrive?
items.answer: No. We do all the heavy lifting. Just point at what you want gone and we'll handle the rest.

items.question: Do you work with landlords?
items.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in tenant move-out cleanouts and fast property turnovers for landlords and property managers.

items.question: Do you take yard waste?
items.answer: Yes. Branches, leaves, grass clippings, landscaping debris, and outdoor clutter.

items.question: Do you do estate cleanouts?
items.answer: Yes. We provide respectful, discreet, and thorough estate cleanout services when you need them most.

knowledgeCard.title: Still Have Questions?
knowledgeCard.description: Just give us a call — we'll give you an honest, straightforward answer.

quotes: We started Dakota Junk Removals because we saw too many homeowners, landlords, and businesses throughout our community struggling with clutter they couldn't get rid of on their own. Overflowing garages packed with years of accumulated stuff.
description: Dakota Junk Removals was built on a simple belief: junk removal shouldn't be complicated, expensive, or stressful. Our founders saw firsthand how many people in Brookings, Sioux Falls, and Watertown were putting off cleanouts simply because they didn't have the time, the truck, or the manpower to handle it themselves. They were overwhelmed by garages packed to the ceiling, rental properties full of abandoned furniture, and yards buried under branches and debris — with no easy, affordable solution in sight.

Today, Dakota Junk Removals proudly serves homeowners, renters, landlords, property managers, contractors, and businesses throughout Brookings, Sioux Falls, Watertown, and all surrounding communities. We've helped hundreds of families reclaim their garages and basements. We've partnered with landlords to turn over rental properties fast. We've worked alongside contractors to keep job sites clean and safe.
ceo.alt: Dakota Junk Removals Team - Locally Owned & Operated
